title_pl: Wariant addytywny: x+y przez exp i ln
title_en: Additive consequence: x + y via exp and ln (specialized)
informal_pl: Wariant chunka 014 z bezpośrednim odwołaniem do dwukrotnego użycia exp/ln; rozłączenie z 014 ma sens, jeśli Aristotle proponuje różne ścieżki dowodowe (np. log_mul + log_exp_self vs Real.log_exp_mul_exp).
informal_en: A re-statement of chunk 014 split out so that Aristotle can use either (log_mul + log_exp) or a direct combined lemma. Useful for the calculator-equivalence chain in Group 6.
lean_target_signature: theorem add_eq_log_mul_exp (x y : ℝ) : x + y = Real.log (Real.exp x) + Real.log (Real.exp y) := by sorry
notes: Trivial via Real.log_exp x + Real.log_exp y; included as a lemma we expect to want when expanding Identity 1 mid-calc.
